# User can edit existing todos

Users should be able to edit the text of existing todo items by double-clicking on them.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Double-clicking a todo item enters edit mode
- The todo text becomes editable in an input field
- Pressing Enter saves the edited text
- Pressing Escape cancels the edit and reverts changes
